blended.narrative: Afton Alps is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 11 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 698 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Monday: flurries, highs of 25°F, winds around 22 mph.
